svg.title: Competitive positioning matrix mapping AI creative players across three layers
svg.desc: A two-axis matrix. Vertical axis is the stack layer from generation engines at the bottom, through integrated suites, to the coordination and orchestration layer at the top. Horizontal axis is output focus from cinematic and general video on the left to structured and practical communication on the right. TENET and Golpo sit in the upper region; foundation models sit at the bottom.
svg.text: Output focus → cinematic / general structured / practical
routes work between specialists · live cost & timeline
model-agnostic generation + collaboration in one place
produce raw assets: clips, voices, frames
